# AO Brand & Identity Policy

**Source:** Google Drive — AO Policy Documents  
**Sync:** Automated via n8n (do not edit directly in repo)  
**Status:** Active

---

## Identity

- Brand name: **Alpha Omega** / **AO** / **ΑΩ**
- Symbol: Greek letters Alpha (Α) and Omega (Ω) — beginning and end, the complete arc
- Positioning: Luxury thermal wellness sanctuary — not a gym, not a spa, not a hotel
- Tone: Assured, unhurried, composed. Never promotional, never performative.

## Colors

| Token | Hex | Name | Use |
|---|---|---|---|
| `accent-primary` | `#2F8F83` | Electrum Teal | Beacon color — use sparingly |
| `surface-0` | `#0B0E11` | Obsidian | Primary background |
| `surface-1` | `#0F1620` | Deep Navy Stone | Cards, alternate bg |
| `surface-2` | `#1C222B` | Bronzed Charcoal | Elevated surfaces |
| `text-primary` | `#EDE9E3` | Warm Ivory | Primary body text |

## Typography

- Headings: `font-heading` (tracking-widest, uppercase for labels)
- Body: `font-sans`
- Monospace: `font-mono` (IDs, codes, technical values)

## Facility Zones (AO Toronto)

Greek-named thermal zones:

| Code | Name | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `ALPHA` | Alpha Zone | Entry / arrival |
| `OMEGA` | Omega Zone | Rest / departure |
| `LABYRINTH` | Labyrinth | Transition corridors |
| `BROTHERHOOD_HALL` | Brotherhood Hall | Social lounge |
| `SANCTUARY` | Sanctuary | Quiet room |
| `CALDARIUM` | Caldarium | Primary heat (Roman-style) |
| `THERMARIUM` | Thermarium | Secondary heat |
| `FRIGIDARIUM` | Frigidarium | Cold contrast pool |

## Voice & Copy Rules

- No exclamation points in operational or staff copy
- Sentences end with periods — calm cadence
- Staff interfaces are functional, not warm-and-fuzzy
- Member-facing copy is warm but never over-promises
- Ritual guidance (ElevenLabs Lane 2) uses George voice — unhurried, British, present
